leadText: Fried Food (Japanese: フライもりあわせ Fried Assortment) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. It's been a while since it was fried, so it's gotten greasy.

sections.title: In the core series games

It's been a while since it was fried, so it's gotten greasy.
